series_metadata.series_title: Construction Management Sysytem Small Quantities Backup Data
series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including supplier test data, material test worksheets, and previous sourse supply. The SUPPLIER TEST DATA lists the components and/or test results from physical testing performed by the Producer/Supplier or from an Independent Testing Lab on this particular material. The results are reviewed by OMM to confirm compliance or noncompliance to ODOT specifications.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: permanently on shared electronic database
